title: Executive secretary; term of office; removal
doc_html:
§6.  Executive secretary; term of office; removal

The term of office of the executive secretary is five years, subject to removal for cause by the unanimous vote of the board of commissioners.
doc_text:
§6.  Executive secretary; term of office; removal
The term of office of the executive secretary is five years, subject to removal for cause by the unanimous vote of the board of commissioners.
